title: Arcana Publish Pipeline
subtitle: From commit to npm — v0.1.0 first publish is hand-rolled; v0.1.1 onward is CI-driven
purpose: Shows the publish path for v0.1.x. The v0.1.0 manual pass surfaces auth/scope/exports gotchas with immediate feedback. v0.1.1 onward proves idempotency via publish.yml.
publish_status: blocked — OTP browser flow required; user handling manually as of 2026-05-19

stages.label: bun run lint
stages.note: Script exists; vacuously passes with no packages (--no-error-on-unmatched-pattern)

stages.label: bun run typecheck
stages.note: Script exists; guard skips tsc -b until packages/*/tsconfig.json exists

stages.label: bun run test
stages.note: Vitest 2.1.9; passWithNoTests=true; vacuously passes with no test files

stages.label: publish.yml: for each pkg in dep order, npm view → skip or publish
Re-run on same tag is no-op
